text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN MeitY Startup Hub India is among top 3 startup ecosystems in the world. In order to boost the Indian economy, innovation and entrepreneurship in the emerging focus area that is being aggressively promoted to give fillip to the Indian economy. A variety of innovation and IPR-related activities are being led and facilitated nationwide by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India, in an effort to grow this ecosystem. In order to facilitate MeitY’s vision of promoting technology innovation, start-ups and creation of Intellectual Properties, a nodal entity called ‘MeitY Start-up Hub’ (MSH) has been setup under its aegis. MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), is a unique, high-impact, digitally-driven scheme which seeks to strengthen the startup ecosystem by integrating the resources, upskilling the entrepreneurs, leveraging the experts, facilitating the knowledge transactions, and promoting the investments in deep-tech startups to support inclusive & sustainable techno-socio-economic development across India and international expansion programs for startups among other activities. To support and leverage the startup ecosystem we host Startups, Incubators, Centres of Entrepreneurship (CoEs), Accelerators, Mentors and Investor. MSH is actively engaged in conducting different Programs, Challenges and Hackathons, both supported and hosted in conjunction with Government bodies, Ministries, Corporates etc. in addition to capacity building workshops across a plethora of topics of interest to our beneficiaries, hosted on our one stop digital platform on Youtube called "MSH Startup School." title: MeityStartupHub
llm_reason: The page contains event and partnership details but does not list any permanent schemes or programmes.
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN Events List Title : 𝗠𝗲𝗶𝘁𝗬 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗿�... Description : MeitY Startup Hub has signed an MoU with HCLTech to jointly strengthen youth entrepreneurship and digital empowerment under the ARISE initiative. The MoU was signed by Srimathi Shivashankar, Corporate Vice President, HCLTech, and Dr.Panneerselvam ( PS ) Madanagopal, CEO, MeitY Startup Hub. Date : July 22, 2025 - July 22, 2025 Posted On : July 24, 2025 Title : 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮–𝗚𝗲𝗿𝗺�... Description : MeitY Startup Hub had the privilege of hosting a high-level delegation from Germany led by Senator Franziska Giffey, Deputy Governing Mayor of Berlin & Senator for Economic Affairs at Electronics Niketan, MeitY. The delegation comprised senior policymakers and key stakeholders from Germany’s innovation ecosystem. Date : July 11, 2025 - July 11, 2025 Posted On : July 14, 2025 Title : SBIxMSH Description : MeitY Startup Hub partners with State Bank of India to Catalyze Startup Growth Across India Drive Awareness – positioning SBI not just as a banking institution, but as a committed growth partner to startups. This includes access to financial mentorship, market insights, and literacy that empowers founders to make informed decisions. Enhance Accessibility – enabling startups to explore SBI’s full suite of offerings, from equity-linked funding and tailored credit lines to sector-specific banking solutions designed to match the evolving needs of startups at every stage. Date : July 9, 2025 - July 9, 2025 Posted On : July 11, 2025 Title : 𝗛𝗼𝗻’𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗦... Description : Today, Shri Jitin Prasada, Hon’ble Minister of State, Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology, conducted a review meeting with MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) to assess ongoing initiatives and future strategies aimed at accelerating India’s deep-tech innovation ecosystem. Date : July 2, 2025 - July 2, 2025 Posted On : July 4, 2025 Title : Deep Tech Industry W... Description : Over 100 tech leaders are joining Immersive Intelligence with Deep Tech, co-hosted by the U.S. Embassy, UConn, nasscom & MeitY Startup Hub. The workshop explores breakthroughs in AI, quantum, cryptography & system architecture. Representing MeitY Startup Hub, Dr.Panneerselvam ( PS ) Madanagopal, began his talk with an impactful quote: “People who are serious about software should make their own hardware.” Date : June 24, 2025 - June 25, 2025 Posted On : July 4, 2025 Title : VivaTech Day 3 Description : As part of the lead-up to the Indo-French Year of Innovation 2026, MeitY Startup Hub was proud to co-host the India Session at VivaTech 2025, at the Business France stand, spotlighting India's dynamic digital journey and strengthening bridges between the Indian and French innovation ecosystems. Date : June 11, 2025 - June 14, 2025 Posted On : July 4, 2025 Title : VivaTech Day 2 Description : Thanks to the leadership of Shri Jitin Prasada, Hon’ble Union Minister of State for Electronics & IT, Commerce & Industry, MeitY Startup Hub had the privilege of being part of a special visit to STATION F during VivaTech Paris. Date : June 11, 2025 - June 14, 2025 Posted On : July 4, 2025 Title : VivaTech Day 1 Description : VivaTech Paris is LIVE! Day 1 kicked off with incredible energy, global conversations, and a powerful showcase of Indian deep-tech innovation. Date : June 11, 2025 - June 14, 2025 Posted On : July 4, 2025 Title : Global Startup Bridg... Description : The MeitY Global Startup Bridge Program culminated with a diplomatic and strategic high point a special closing reception hosted at the Indian Embassy in Belgium, graced by 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗶 𝗦𝗮𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗵 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿, Ambassador of India to EU, Belgium & Luxembourg, and other senior dignitaries. Date : May 26, 2025 - May 30, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : Global Startup Bridg... Description : The final leg of the MeitY startup hub Global Startup Bridge Program—in partnership with hub.brussels and implemented by Carve Startup Labs—featured sessions that blended legal insights, space-tech innovation, and cutting-edge telecom advancements, offering startups a dynamic close to their global immersion. Experts from Beyond Law Firm delivered key legal insights to support startups in international growth and cross-border expansion strategies. Date : May 26, 2025 - May 30, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : Global Startup Bridg... Description : Day 4 of the MeitY Global Startup Bridge Program—in partnership with hub.brussels and implemented by Carve Startup Labs—brought together frontier tech insights and Brussels’ rich heritage. Date : May 26, 2025 - May 29, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : Global Startup Bridg... Description : Continuing the international immersion of our startups, we began the first half of Day 3 of the MeitY Global Startup Bridge Program, held in partnership with hub.brussels and implemented by Carve Startup Labs, with a deep dive into the Limburg ecosystem. Date : May 26, 2025 - May 29, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : Global Startup Bridg... Description : On 27th May, during the first half of Day 2, the MeitY Global Startup Bridge Program explored VUB Brubotics, the premier robotics research center at Vrije Universiteit Brussel University focused on transforming human-robot interaction. Date : May 26, 2025 - May 29, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : Global Startup Bridg... Description : On 26th May, we officially kicked off the MeitY Global Startup Bridge Program in Brussels — connecting India’s deep tech startups with the heart of Europe’s innovation ecosystem. Date : May 26, 2025 - May 29, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : Electronic Manufactu... Description : The MSH Deeptech Arena at Startup Mahakumbh 2025 witnessed a high-impact session on Electronic Manufacturing & Design (ESDM) – Open Challenge, powered by MeitY Startup Hub & ELCINA. The stage was set with a compelling Opening Remark by Shri Rajoo Goel, Secretary General, Electronic Industries Association of India-ELCINA, followed by an inspiring context-setting address from Dr.Panneerselvam ( PS ) Madanagopal Madanagopal, CEO, MeitY Startup Hub, igniting the spirit of deeptech innovation. Date : April 3, 2025 - April 5, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : PSU Transformation C... Description : At the 4th Edition of PSU Transformation Conclave in New Delhi, our CEO emphasized the vital role PSUs can play in strengthening India’s startup ecosystem. He called upon Public Sector Undertakings to come forward with a collaborative spirit — not just as supporters, but as active co-creators of innovation. Date : April 17, 2025 - April 17, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : MSH Deeptech Arena F... Description : The session was moderated by Shri Panneerselvam Madanagopal, CEO of MeitY Startup Hub, and brought together top minds shaping the future of innovation. A key highlight of the discussion was the presence of Mr. Amarjeet Makhija, Markets Lead – Advisory, Startups & Unicorns at PwC, who shared invaluable insights drawn from his experience working closely with high-growth ventures and market disruptors. The conversation focused on identifying and unpacking the multi-dimensional challenges faced by startups today , ranging from regulatory complexities, capital access, and global market shifts to the rapid pace of technological change. Date : April 3, 2025 - June 5, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : MSH Deeptech Arena a... Description : This cutting-edge technology is the first-ever voice AI chatbot on a Government of India website, setting a new benchmark for accessibility and digital governance. With multilingual support, featuring Liapplus AI, this innovative tool takes digital governance to the next level, making government services more inclusive and user-friendly for all. Date : April 3, 2025 - April 5, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : JSS Step Description : MeitY Startup Hub was delighted to witness the energy and innovation at the Future Tech Summit 2025, hosted by JSS STEP, Noida on 24th April 2025 at the India Habitat Centre, New Delhi. Date : April 24, 2025 - April 24, 2025 Posted On : June 24, 2025 Title : VivaTech Paris Description : From startup spotlights to ecosystem connects, the momentum is building — and MeitY Startup Hub is proud to be a part of India’s presence at the world’s biggest tech stage! title: MeityStartupHub
heading: Welcome to the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit!
llm_reason: The provided page does not contain information related to a specific scheme or programme but rather an overview of the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit.
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN G20 DIA > G20 DIA OVERVIEW G20- Digital Innovation Alliance Welcome to the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit! India's presidency of the G20 Summit is a source of immense pride. As part of this presidency, the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India, and the MeitY Start-up Hub are organizing the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit in Bengaluru at the Bangalore Palace, from August 17th to 19th, 2023. With the focal theme, 'Driving Digital Innovation for World Economies', the Summit anticipates substantial participation from delegates representing the G20 countries and 9 guest countries, including policymakers, business leaders, technocrats, young innovators, and investors. Event Theme: Driving Digital Innovation for World Economies This theme highlights the importance of harnessing the power of Digital Innovation to propel economic growth, foster sustainable development and address global challenges. By driving digital innovation, the summit aims to facilitate collaboration, knowledge sharing, and policy discussions among G20 member countries and guest countries. The theme recognizes the critical need to leverage emerging technologies, foster digital inclusion, and build resilient digital infrastructure to unlock the full potential of economies and drive prosperity in the digital age. VENUE: Bengaluru Palace G20 Digital India Innovation Summit will be held at the historic Bangalore Palace, a Tudor-style palace located in the heart of the city. The sprawling Palace was built in 1887 as a summer residence of the Royal Family of Mysore, India. The palace has hosted many international events and concerts. The Palace interiors are open to visitors. Quick Links Broucher Exhibitor Manual Floor Plan Exhibitor Directory Indian Startup Ecosystem India is now the hub of 'Start-up' ecosystem in the world, ranking third with 90,000 'Startups' and 107 unicorn companies worth $30 billion. The Indian startup ecosystem is built on several key pillars, including government support, access to capital, a growing talent pool, and a supportive culture for entrepreneurship. Another important factor contributing to the growth of startups in India is the role played by incubators and accelerators. These organizations provide startups with access to resources and support, including mentoring, funding, and networking opportunities. One of the most important factors contributing to the growth of startups in India is access to capital. While funding was once a major challenge for startups in India, the situation has improved significantly in recent years. There are now a growing number of venture capital firms and angel investors in India, and the country has seen a surge in startup funding over the past few years. During the three day event, participating innovators will get a chance to pitch their solutions to a strong and diversified jury committee, comprising representatives from academia, corporates, ministries and investors. The Jury would choose the top 3 digital innovations in each category. As part of the virtual acceleration program and start-up summit, innovators will have the opportunity to network with other start-ups, showcase their innovation, pitch to the investors, seek partnership with the corporates, and build a deeper understanding of the opportunities to scale globally. Awards Ceremony The Awards Ceremony at the Summit will celebrate the ingenuity and achievement of Start-ups from across the G20 member countries and 9 guest Countries. With 30 categories to honour excellence in various sectors, the Awards Ceremony will recognize innovative solutions that have potential to shape the respective industries. The Ceremony will be attended by industry leaders, investors, Central & State Government Officials, and tech enthusiasts, creating an atmosphere of celebration and inspiration Start-up Pitching Session The Start-up Pitching Session is a dynamic and inspiring event that exemplifies the spirit of entrepreneurship and innovation at the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit. This is a unique opportunity for Start-ups to pitch their business models, products/ services to a distinguished panel of investors, leaders and potential partners. This session serves as a Launchpad for start-ups to attract funding, partnerships, and valuable mentorship, propelling their growth and success. Networking Mixer This exclusive gathering will provide a vibrant atmosphere for fostering connections, collaborations, and partnerships. Attendees will have the opportunity to engage in meaningful conversations, exchange ideas, and explore potential business opportunities. The Networking Mixer offers a relaxed and informal setting where participants can build relationships, share experiences, and learn from one another. Whether it's finding potential investors, securing partnerships, or simply expanding professional networks, this event is a valuable platform for expanding horizons and leveraging the collective expertise of the global digital community. Gala Dinner The Gala Dinner at the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit will be an enchanting evening of fine dining, entertainment and celebration. The evening will bring together influential leaders, distinguished guests, and prominent figures from the digital innovation ecosystem. Invited guests will have the opportunity to network in a relaxed and sophisticated atmosphere, fostering connections and relationships, and create a memorable experience that enhances the sense of community and camaraderie. text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN G20 DIA > The Summit Conference The 3-day Conference at the G20 Digital Innovation Alliance Summit is set to be a convergence of innovation, collaboration, and transformative ideas under the central event theme- 'Driving Digital Innovation for World Economies'. Bringing together start-ups, Central & State government agencies, corporates, research and development institutions, and academia from G20 member countries and 9 guest countries, the conference will serve as a platform for global digital advancements. Key Focus Sectors Winner of G20-DIA Global Pitching Edtech Sector Startup Rank Country Startup Name Founder Name Description Winner Republic of Korea Mathpresso Jose Jeong Mathpresso is an edtech startup running an educational platform called “Qanda”, an AI-based learning app that allows students of all levels to receive instant answers and customized learning sources where students can upload pictures of math problems when they need help and mobile tutors send them solutions. It aims to create a platform for personalized education by collecting big data through Qanda and providing content that is tailored for each student. 1st Runner Up Turkey Dusyeri Ayşe Şule Bilgiç With this application, users can scan the QR codes on the Dusyeri branded books, games, and all other products and view their contents easily. This app has thousands of content scientifically created especially for children by experts as a result of 3 years of study in a single application. 2nd Runner Up India Filo edtech Pvt. Ltd Imbesat Ahmad, Rohit Kumar & Shadman Anwer Filo is the world’s only live instant tutoring app where students are connected with expert tutors in less than 60 seconds for 1-1, interactive video sessions. More than 1.5 million students across 15+ countries are using Filo to make their everyday learning better. Currently, there are 50,000+ tutors on Filo, which makes it the largest community of tutors in the world. Audience Choice Nigeria FlexiSAF Edusoft Ltd. Faiz Bashir FlexiSAF EduSoft Solutions Ltd is an indigenously owned ICT company headquartered in Abuja, Nigeria. At FlexiSAF, they are dedicated to the improvement of the education sector using ICT as a core tool. They aim to be a leading player in the Information Technology Industry with a focus on taking the education sector to the next level using knowledge, creativity, and Innovation. Best Women Founder Singapore Cognalearn Brian O’Dwyer Shreya Verma CognaLearn is the creator of InteDashboard, an all-in-one team-based learning platform on a mission to help educators and students drive better learning outcomes. They have built software that empowers educators to transform the way they teach their students. Agritech Sector Startup Rank Country Startup Name Founder Name Description Winner India AquaExchange Agritech Pvt Ltd Pavan Krishna Kosaraju A technology firm started with a vision to utilize the latest technologies to bring about transparency and efficiencies in the entire Aqua sector value chain, supporting Aqua farmers, exporters, and other stakeholders primarily by capturing accurate data at every point in the value chain using a combination of active farmer-facing associates, an easy-to-use mobile application, and a proprietary technology developed using Machine Learning techniques. 1st Runner Up Japan EF Polymer Hiroshi Yoshikawa, Kunihiro Shimoji, Narayan Lal Gujar EF Polymer is an agricultural firm that provides products & sustainable input solutions to save water and fertilizer usage. EF Polymer Private Limited was founded out of a pure passion to help farmers across the world struggling with huge water and fertilizer requirements. 2nd Runner Up Indonesia Eratani Andrew Soeherman Eratani is an Agri-tech company that focuses on building an agricultural ecosystem and seeks to provide farmers with access to technology to increase the productivity and welfare of the agricultural ecosystem. Their aim is to create a healthy agricultural environment by utilizing digitalization and transparency at every stage. Collaborating with food and beverage companies to increase national food security. Audience Choice France BRAD Olivier Brad Technology’s mission is to be the voice of soil health by providing farmers with better real-time knowledge of agricultural soils through data and forecasting. To this end, the AgriTech Brad solution helps to better produce in an uncertain and changing agricultural context, by combining different digital technologies, such as the Internet of Things and Artificial Intelligence. Best Women Founder Indonesia Chickin Tubagus Syailendra W Chickin provides an IoT and data analytics system for broiler chicken production. Its tech allows for livestock monitoring, cage management, and climate control. FinTech Sector Startup Rank Country Startup Name Founder Name Description Winner India Fibe Akshay Mehrotra An online lending platform allowing you to access various credit facilities, the most popular of which is the Fibe Personal Loan. With its smartphone application, you can avail personal loans online anytime and instantly to meet your urgent expenses. 1st Runner Up Brazil Predify Carlos Schmiedel Predify is an online software for Pricing and Planning. They offer Business Intelligence and Strategic Planning intuitively in software specially designed for small and micro-entrepreneurs to spend less time accounting and more time doing business. 2nd Runner Up Japan GINCO Ryotaro Tsukii Ginco's goal is to change the relationship between individuals and assets by making full use of blockchain technology. The primary focus of Ginco, its cryptocurrency wallet app, is centered around dApp and the On-Chain function. In the future, they have the possibility of developing with DEXs (decentralized exchanges). Audience Choice Egypt Money Fellows Ahmed Wadi MoneyFellows is a collaborative group lending and savings platform. MoneyFellows gives individuals access to interest-free credit and better saving achievements, all fully powered by just their social network. Best Women Founder USA Youthful Savings Somya R. Munjal They help develop the human spirit - one educated, happy youth at a time and are committed to empowering the next generation with heart intelligent education and entrepreneurship training so they can lead the life that they want and create a better world for all by educating youth to learn how to make money work for them and not allow money to overtake them. Circular Economy Sector Startup Rank Country Startup Name Founder Name Description Winner Singapore Environsens Shailesh Kharkwal EnvironSens is a spin-off from National University of Singapore in 2018 and the team has worked closely with PUB, Singapore’s National Water Agency over the last 7 years for I2BioS development and are supported by Enterprise Singapore. 1st Runner Up Republic of Korea Nuvilab Hyuk Park Nuvilab leads the digital transition of the Food Industry to sustain the environment and improve personal well-being. With its instant food recognition technology, Nuvilab AI Food Scanner can accurately analyze the food type and volume without any hassle. By utilizing Big Data, food-related information including leftover food details, user preferences, optimized menu recommendations, nutritional benefits can be integrated to provide a personalized nutritional report and guidelines for a healthy dietary habit. 2nd Runner Up Turkey Nivogo Ali Cem Yücebağ, Arnas Akbaş Nivogo is a pioneer re-commerce start-up aims to revolutionize the entire fashion industry through Turkey’s first & largest re-commerce center in the fashion industry powered by circularity and cutting-edge technology. Audience Choice India Phool.co Ankit Agarwal World’s first profitable and lean solution to the monumental ‘temple-waste’ problem. They daily collect floral-waste from temples in Uttar Pradesh, India which are handcrafted into charcoal-free incense, organic and biodegradable packaging material using ‘Flowercycling’ technology. HealthTech Sector Startup Rank Country Startup Name Founder Name Description Winner Brazil LINDA Lifetech Rubens Fernando de Lima Mendrone LINDA is a Brazilian startup that developed a platform that helps doctors and healthcare professionals in the early detection of breast cancer. Through their proprietary methodology, protected by patents in 159 countries, they help detect early-stage breast lesions using painless technology, without radiation and without physical contact with patients. They are in more than 20 cities in Brazil with more than 10 thousand patients seen in just 6 months of operation. 1st Runner Up India Niramai Health Analytix Geetha Manjunath NIRAMAI has developed a novel artificial intelligence-based medical device to detect breast cancer at a much earlier stage than traditional methods or self-examination. Niramai Thermalytix is available in 30 cities in India across 200+ Hospitals and Diagnostic Centers. This unique solution can be used as a cancer diagnosis test in hospitals, for regular preventive health checkups, and also for large-scale screening in rural and semi-urban areas. 2nd Runner Up Russia Motorica Marina Fadeeva Motorica focuses on research and development in modern technologies in medicine and robotics. They produce functional upper limb gadget-prostheses for everyday life. The company works both with individuals and with public and private prosthetic enterprises. Motorica is a resident of Skolkovo Innovation Center and cooperates with various international companies and associations in the prostheses field. Audience Choice Netherlands Eindhoven Medical Robotics Chinmay Nemade Eindhoven Medical Robotics develops high-precision surgical robotic solutions for vitreo-retinal eye surgery, microsurgery, and bone surgery. They work in close collaboration with universities, engineering partners, suppliers, and hospitals worldwide. Best Women Founder South Africa Medsol Dr. Kathryn Malherbe Medsol is an online patient-based platform that receives images for ultrasound units in practice. The images are then fed into a unique system that identifies any abnormal breast cancer masses. This high-tech system speaks to both the specialist physician and the patient to provide diagnostic solutions, education, and support for their journey. Their software is mobile and hands-free and is ideal for rural-based institutions wanting to improve their diagnostic output. Secure Digital Infrastructure Sector Startup Rank Country Startup Name Founder Name Description Winner Egypt Bosta Mohamed Ezzat Bosta provides an on-demand courier app with a B2C focus, allowing users to send parcels to their customers. Bosta was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Cairo, Al Qahirah, Egypt. 1st Runner Up Germany Asvin GmbH Mirko Ross, Sven Rahlfs Asvin is an evolving cybersecurity company focusing on predictive solutions to ensure system security and resilience, offering risk analysis and software supply chain risk management addressing operational and regulatory needs. Asvin empowers cyber resilience and safeguards your assets throughout the entire lifecycle. 2nd Runner Up France Pasqal Krisztian PASQAL builds quantum computers from ordered neutral atoms in 2D and 3D arrays to bring a practical quantum advantage to its customers and address real-world problems. PASQAL was founded in 2019. Audience Choice India Tsecond Generation Technology Pvt. Ltd Sahil Chawla Tsecond has been leading as a developer of disruptive technologies. In 2020, Tsecond expanded as a growth stage portfolio company of AEI HorizonX (a strategic venture capital fund anchored by Boeing) based in San Jose, California, USA. Tsecond’s mission is to reform the global datasphere with technologies that increase the speed, volume, and efficiency with which data travels to workplaces and homes across the world. heading: MEITY STARTUP HUB PARTNERS WITH STATE BANK OF INDIA
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN PROGRAMS > MSH CORPORATE > SBI MEITY STARTUP HUB PARTNERS WITH STATE BANK OF INDIA ENABLING STARTUP GROWTH THROUGH STRATEGIC FINANCIAL ACCESS As part of its mission to build a robust and inclusive startup ecosystem, MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) has partnered with the State Bank of India (SBI) — India’s largest public sector bank — to empower startups with the right mix of financial access, strategic mentorship, and ecosystem enablement. BUILDING AWARENESS: BEYOND BANKING SBI joins hands with MSH not just as a banking institution, but as a committed growth partner. Through this collaboration, startups will benefit from: Access to financial literacy programs and mentorship Exposure to market insights and capital-readiness support Guidance on financial planning, compliance, and risk management This awareness-focused approach ensures that founders make informed, confident financial decisions as they scale. ENHANCING ACCESSIBILITY: FINANCING WHAT’S NEXT With this partnership, startups can tap into SBI’s startup-centric offerings, including: Equity-linked funding opportunities Tailored credit lines and working capital support Support through SBI’s pan-India branch and digital network A STEP TOWARD INCLUSIVE STARTUP GROWTH By bridging the gap between innovation and financial infrastructure, the MSH x SBI partnership is set to power a new wave of entrepreneurship, from metropolitan hubs to Tier II/III cities.Together, we aim to create an enabling environment where startups are not only funded, but also mentored, connected, and equipped for sustainable growth. Are you a startup looking to scale with the right financial partner? Explore tailored offerings and startup-focused solutions from SBI here: SBI Startup Portal. This is your gateway to growth GET IN TOUCH Looking to explore SBI’s startup offerings or need personalized assistance? Connect with dedicated SBI Startup Branches, listed below to get the right guidance and support tailored to your startup’s needs. title: MeityStartupHub
heading: GOOGLE APPSCALE ACADEMY 2023 IMPACT
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN PROGRAMS > MSH CORPORATE > GOOGLE APPSCALE ACADEMY 2023 IMPACT GOOGLE APPSCALE ACADEMY 2023 IMPACT Google Appscale Academy the Class of 2023, was executed with 100 startups selected from over 950 applications, represents a diverse range of sectors, including education, health, social impact, gaming, agriculture, and more. These innovative startups have harnessed technology to address critical needs, making a tangible impact on society. Appscale Academy has been instrumental in training and mentoring early to mid-stage startups, empowering them to build high-quality apps for both local and global markets. A comprehensive Google Appscale Academy 2023 VC Handbook showcasing the success stories of the program. The VC handbook serves as a consolidated repository, featuring details of all the selected startups. Indian developers continue to push boundaries by building innovative solutions for many complex challenges. Be it apps supporting diverse communities or global games emerging from beyond metro cities, we’re seeing inspiring local developers across the country underscore India’s rise as a powerful app development hub. Indian developers continue to push boundaries by building innovative solutions for many complex challenges. Be it apps supporting diverse communities or global games emerging from beyond metro cities, we’re seeing inspiring local developers across the country underscore India’s rise as a powerful app development hub. The program is outlined with a customized curriculum, including virtual instructor-led webinars, self-learning material, and mentorship sessions with leading local and global professionals from the industry. he curated, 6-month training program will identify, support and nurture promising Indian startups to supercharge their growth on Android. GOOGLE APPSCALE ACADEMY 2023 ROADSHOWS To build general awareness for the program amongst the broader ecosystem, especially in beyondmetro cities and supercharge their growth on Android, MeitY Startup Hub and Google organized 5 roadshows in 5 cities (Surat, Indore, Coimbatore, Jaipur, Gangtok) with the 5 incubation centres as implementation partners (AIC-RAISE - Coimbatore, Incub8 - Surat, Headstart, SGSITS-Shri Govindram Institute of Technology and Science - Indore, JECRC - Jaipur Engineering College and Research Centre, Atal Incubation Centre Sikkim Manipal University Technology Business Incubation Foundation (AIC-SMUTBI) - Gangtok). GOOGLE APPSCALE ACADEMY 2023 TOP 100 REVEAL EVENT AT INDIA HABITAT CENTRE Hon'ble Joint Secretary, MeitY, Shri Akash Tripathi unveiled the class of 2023 of Appscale Academy 2023. He added "India, currently holding the prestigious Presidency of G20 nations, has grown from being the tenth largest economy ten years ago to the fifth largest today. India has been the fastest growing major economy for the third year in a row—assured for further growth, driven strongly by, among other factors, a vigorous and diverse technology ecosystem. Google and MeitY's partnership through MSH have added a lot of value to the Indian startup ecosystem. My Best wishes to the Class of 2023" The chosen early to mid-stage startups will be guided by Appscale Academy to build high-quality apps for the world. The 100 startups were chosen from over 950 applications following an in-depth selection process that considered their creative ideas and innovation, product quality, product scalability, and talent diversity. 50% of the cohort representing major sectors like education, health, social, agriculture and more come from beyond metro cities including Varanasi, Ernakulam,Surat, Dehradun, Allahabad and more. Addressing the Top 100 startups selected for the program, CEO, MSH, Mr. Jeet Vijay added, "India offers rainbow of opportunities for the startups and entrepreneurs. India is showing way for the world with its dominance in digital public goods. India Stack, CoWin, Aadhar, UPI, Digilocker etc. are the biggest contributions of digital public goods that India can make to the world. More importantly this makes it possible for every society and economy to be more inclusive. It’s about tech that can be used for everyone in the world. It’s about a common man being able to use the power of technology and do something that is useful to them." title: MeityStartupHub
heading: MEITY STARTUP HUB AND MATHWORKS PARTNER TO ACCELERATE DEEP TECH INNOVATION
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN PROGRAMS > MSH CORPORATE > MATHWORKS MEITY STARTUP HUB AND MATHWORKS PARTNER TO ACCELERATE DEEP TECH INNOVATION MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) has signed a Statement of Intent (SoI) with MathWorks to bolster India’s deep tech startup ecosystem, providing access to state-of-the-art computational tools, advanced simulation models, and world-class training resources. As part of this partnership, MathWorks will provide complimentary access to over 100 products under its Accelerator Program, including MATLAB® and Simulink, for 12 months to all MeitY associated startups. This invaluable resource will empower startups to develop and refine their innovations with powerful computational capabilities. Beyond software access, participating startups will benefit from Technical Mentorship: Expert guidance to navigate complex technical challenges. Specialized Training: Tailored programs to maximize the utilization of MathWorks tools. Discounted Professional Access: Continued access to MathWorks products at preferential rates post-program. To further enhance industry engagement, MSH and MathWorks will conduct collaborative physical workshops at leading incubation centres across India. These workshops will empower startups, researchers, and industry professionals with the practical skills needed to address real-world challenges and accelerate innovation. Furthermore, MathWorks will offer advanced training at discounted fees, supporting faster innovation cycles and market access. Startups will also benefit from participation in MathWorks-organized events, such as MATLAB EXPO and webinars, along with opportunities to showcase their solutions on global platforms. We are thrilled to partner with MeitY Startup Hub to empower deep tech startups driving innovation in electrification, automation, and AI,” said Mr. Sunil Motwani, Country Manager, MathWorks India. “Through our tools and expertise, we aim to accelerate the development of transformative technologies that will shape the future of mobility and beyond. At MSH, we are excited to announce our commitment to empowering startups with advanced MathWorks products,” said Mr. Pannerselvam, CEO, MSH. “This partnership will support innovations that will provide startups with a significant edge in key technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Wireless Communication, and Automation. This strategic deep tech partnership bridges the gap between technology and entrepreneurship, providing Indian startups with the essential resources to innovate, scale, and tackle global challenges. Together, MSH and MathWorks are building a thriving, future-ready startup ecosystem in India. heading: MEITY STARTUP HUB (MSH), MICRON AND PIEDS, CREST (BITS PILANI), LAUNCH A SEMICONDUCTOR ACCELERATOR FOR EARLY-STAGE STARTUPS
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN PROGRAMS > MSH CORPORATE > MICRON MEITY STARTUP HUB (MSH), MICRON AND PIEDS, CREST (BITS PILANI), LAUNCH A SEMICONDUCTOR ACCELERATOR FOR EARLY-STAGE STARTUPS MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) an independent division of the Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India in partnership with Micron and PIEDS, the Technology Business Incubator and Center for Research Excellence in Semiconductor Technologies (CREST) of BITS Pilani announced today the launch of CREST accelerator program for startups in Semiconductor domain. The accelerator program will curate a cohort of startups and provide each with funding of up to Rs. 10 Lacs, with an opportunity to raise further investment at the end of the program. Mentors and advisors from Micron, MSH, and BITS Pilani shall guide the startups. The accelerator is being launched on the heels of the government’s big push to make India a semiconductor hub and an ambitious India Semiconductor Mission (ISM) by MeitY. The startups shall be able to use tools, labs, and facilities at Micron facilities and at the Centre for Research and Entrepreneurship in Semiconductor Technologies (CREST), BITS Pilani, Hyderabad campus, and the network of MeitY supported labs and facilities across India. Shri Rajnish Kumar, CEO, MeitY Startup Hub, said, “We congratulate the PIDES team for their initiative to support semiconductor startups with funding, mentorship, and access to Micron’s facilities for product development. Together with Micron, we are committed to nurturing the next generation of pioneers in semiconductor technology” Sachin Arya, Head, PIEDS said, “The startups will play an integral role in India’s ambitious Semiconductor Mission, and further strengthen India’s indigenous design and development capabilities. We are excited to support promising startups in Semiconductors and utilize BITS Pilani’s capabilities in Semiconductor research and innovation for overall ecosystem development.” Prof. Sanket Goel, Dean (Research & Innovation) and Convenor, CREST, said, “The Semiconductor Accelerator, will bridge the critical gap between innovative ideas and market reality for early-stage startups in chip design. By leveraging resources, mentorship, and industry connections, this dynamic program will empower students and recent graduate entrepreneurs to thrive. By providing access to seed funding, state-of-the-art labs, and a collaborative learning environment, the Accelerator will foster the next generation of innovators, shaping the future of this transformative technology.” Interested startups can apply to the CREST accelerator program by logging on to the MSH’s website https://msh.meity.gov.in/ PIEDS PIED Society is a leading platform that helps entrepreneurs get access to resources that can help them come together and innovate the future of India. It is a Technology Business Incubator at BITS Pilani which was set up in 2004 with support from Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, and have incubated many campus and alumni driven startups. With a mission to support every innovative idea that can scale to be successful, PIED Society works with startups from all BITS campuses, its alumni, and beyond. MICRON Micron is a world leader in innovative memory solutions that transform how the world uses information. For over 45 years, Micron has been instrumental to the world’s most significant technology advancements, delivering optimal memory and storage systems for a broad range of applications. CREST With a vision to make BITS Pilani as the leading academic institution for Semiconductor Education, Research and Innovation in India, Center for Research Excellence in Semiconductor Technologies (CREST) was launched in 2023. Since then, CREST is on the forefront of diversified activities, including professional development courses, hands-on training programs, minor-and-major degree programs, and organizing lectures. CREST houses labs in the entire value-chain of semiconductors, and supports faculty members, PhD scholars and interns to implement many innovative projects, and collaborated with various international and national academic institutes and industry. More details: https://crest.bits-pilani.ac.in/. The second season of Samsung Solve for Tomorrow was inaugurated by Shri. Alkesh Kumar Sharma, Secretary, Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY) in the presence of Prof. Rangan Banerjee, Director, IIT Delhi, Mr. Jeet Vijay, CEO, MeitY Startup Hub and Mr. JongBum Park, President & CEO, Samsung Southwest Asia. MESSAGE BY HONORABLE SECRETARY MEITY, SHRI. ALKESH KUMAR SHARMA “The vision of the Government of India is to promote a vibrant ecosystem of innovation and entrepreneurship in the country, and youth are at the centre of this. They need all the support and mentoring that can help them turn their ideas into reality, creating a strong social impact along the way. heading: About the program
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN Shortlisted Startups XR Startup Program A program to discover, nurture, and accelerate XR technology startups across India. About the program XR Startup Program is a collaboration between Meta and MeitY Startup Hub (MSH). The program aims to accelerate India’s contribution towards building the foundations of the metaverse and nurturing the development of Extended Reality (XR) technologies in India. The metaverse is the next generation of the internet. It will be a set of digital spaces, including 3D experiences that are all interconnected so people can easily move between them and will let people do things they could not do in the physical world. While the defining quality of the metaverse will be a feeling of presence, the defining technologies of the metaverse will be Extended Reality (XR), including Augmented Reality (AR), Virtual Reality (VR) and Mixed Reality (MR). Click here to read more Accelerator About the Accelerator The Accelerator will nurture and foster 40 early-stage startups working with XR technologies through a well-designed 6-month program. Each startup will get access to a number of benefits, including a grant of ₹ 20,00,000, mentorship by industry experts and researchers, access to a network of potential strategic partners and investors, technology and infrastructure support, and opportunities to participate and present at relevant industry events. North zone - FITT South zone - FITT East zone - FITT West zone - FITT Grand Challenge About the Grand Challenge The Grand Challenge is aimed at supporting early-stage innovators to upscale from the R&D phase to developing workable prototypes and Minimum Viable Products (MVPs). It will include 4 sector-specific challenges to advance the XR technology ecosystem in India. A total of 80 shortlisted innovators will receive a grant of ₹ 50,000 and an opportunity to attend the bootcamp. Of the 80 shortlisted innovators, 16 innovators will be supported with grants worth ₹ 20,00,000 to help them develop MVP(s)/ prototypes. Benefits include mentorship by industry experts and researchers, access to a network of potential strategic partners and investors, technology and infrastructure support, and opportunities to participate and present at industry events. title: MeityStartupHub
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN As part of its mission to accelerate international market access and foster long-term global partnerships, MeitY Startup Hub led a high-impact delegation of Indian deep-tech startups to Brussels from May 26–29, 2025, under the MeitY Global Startup Bridge Program. This edition aimed to connect Indian startups with the European innovation ecosystem through cross-border collaboration, policy engagement, and knowledge exchange.The program focused on enabling market access, forging corporate and government partnerships, unlocking investment opportunities, facilitating technology exchange, and deepening ecosystem engagement. The Brussels edition reaffirmed MeitY Startup Hub’s vision of enabling Indian startups to scale globally through strategic partnerships, international exposure, and ecosystem-level collaboration. With the MeitY Global Startup Bridge initiative, MeitY Startup Hub positions itself as a strategic facilitator, bridging Indian deep-tech startups with the global market. The initiative addresses core startup needs such as international market access, investor and corporate connections, regulatory guidance, R&D collaboration, and ecosystem visibility. But beyond access and funding, the MeitY Startup Hub also opens doors to the right people, platforms, and partnerships, ensuring startups are not just supported, but strategically connected to scale globally. If you're a startup looking to grow beyond borders, not just through research or capital, but by plugging into the right global networks, this is your gateway. The signing of MoU between MeitY Startup Hub and hub.brussels at the Indian Embassy, by Dr. Paneerselvam Madanagopal, CEO, MeitY Startup Hub, and Mr. Bart Vandeputte, Trade and Invest Commissioner, hub.brussels, in the presence of Ambassador Shri Saurabh Kumar, underscoring a shared commitment to foster India–Belgium innovation partnerships. A key highlight was the signing of an MoU between Indian startup IG Drones and Belgian firm VoxelSensors, aimed at advancing bilateral collaboration in drone and sensor technologies. - Click on the tabs to know more: Why Brussels? title: MeityStartupHub
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN SCHEMES > GENESIS Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups (GENESIS) With an aim to boost the startup ecosystem in Tier-II & Tier-III cities in the country, Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) has approved implementation of the ‘Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups (GENESIS)’ Scheme with a budgetary outlay of Rs. 490 Crore for a duration of 5 years. The scheme envisages further scaling up and sustaining the startup ecosystem especially to discover, grow and nurture technology startups. The scheme aims to support approx. 1600 tech start-ups over the course of next 5 years List of selected Implementing Agencies Major objectives of the Scheme: Consolidation of startup related schemes and assets of MeitY for greater efficiency, asset utilization and enhanced support for startups. Provide Tier-II/ III cities focused funding to critically support Pilot/ Investment, Early-stage and deep-tech startups. Strengthening Incubators, building stronger startup ecosystem via capacity building initiatives in Tier II/ III cities. Major components of GENESIS: Entrepreneur in Residence (EiR) Support to students and entrepreneurs to validate their startup ideas so as to create momentum in Tier II/ III cities for entrepreneurship. Pilot Funding Support to startups who have validated their idea and need to pilot their product. Investment Support to startups that are raising funds from the market and this will bring domestic rupee capital into the Tier II/ III cities across India. Deep-Tech Funding Support to a select number of startups that are developing high impact solutions. The program aims to support 300 tech Start-Ups in 3-year duration with cohort size of 5-10 Start-Ups. SAMRIDH Program is conceptualized and being implemented to provide support to selected accelerators for extending acceleration services to start-ups along with one-to-one matching funding support of up to ₹40 lakh. In the first round of cohort, 22 Accelerators spread across 12 states are supporting 175 startups, selected through a multilevel screening process. Success Stories of SAMRIDH supported Startups Major Objective: The SAMRIDH scheme aims to support existing and upcoming Accelerators to select and accelerate potential IT-based startups to scale. title: MeityStartupHub
heading: Scheme for Accelerating Startups around Post COVID Technology Opportunities (SASACT)
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN SCHEMES > SASACT Scheme for Accelerating Startups around Post COVID Technology Opportunities (SASACT) MeitY had launched SASACT (Scheme for Accelerating Start-ups Around post-COVID Technology) programme to support electronics hardware/ ICT based tech entrepreneurial initiatives of startups for developing or re-purposing technologies, tools, systems, solutions to respond to the post COVID-19 scenario emerging in the near horizon. Under the programme, eligible startups are being supported to augment and deploy into the market select technology products/ solutions within a span of 1 year. Key action areas being supported under the program are as smart/digital manufacturing including 3D printing, safety equipment, Medtech, Edtech, WFH solutions, fintech and the likes. The scheme had total outlay of Rs 10.0 Crore over a period of one year. 41 startups were selected and supported under the scheme. SASACT was executed by four Implementing Agencies (IAs), pan India for maximum coverage viz. Start up Incubation and Innovation Centre SIIC, IIT Kanpur; Society for Innovation & Entrepreneurship (SINE), IIT Bombay; Coimbatore Innovation and Business Incubator (Forge Accelerator) Coimbatore KIIT Technology Business Incubator, KIIT University, Bhubaneswar Download SASACT Report (Attachment) Get to Know Terms & Conditions Sitemap Careers Feedback About Us Contact Us Grievance Blogs Forum Privacy Policy Faqs Stay Connected Number of Users Visited MSH 2.0 Portal: 606309 Useful Links MyGov MeitY MeitY Dashboard Digital India Corporation Open Government Data National e-Governance Division India Semiconductor Mission Digital India Bhashini Startup India NITI Aayog Subscribe MeitY Startup Hub is legally registered as Independent Business Division(IBD) of Digital India Corporation. ©2023. title: MeityStartupHub
text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN SCHEMES > TIDE 2.0 Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs (TIDE 2.0) TIDE 2.0 will promote tech entrepreneurship through financial and technical support to incubators engaged in supporting ICT startups primarily engaged in using emerging technologies such as IoT, AI, Block-chain, Robotics etc. in pre-identified areas of societal relevance. The Scheme will be implemented through empowering 51 incubators in India and handholding close to 2000 tech start-ups over a period of 5 years. The scheme envisions creating a holistic ecosystem to support technology startups and incubation centers through identifying and creating necessary linkages. MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) would be setup under TIDE 2.0 to ensure synergistic linkages among the TIDE 2.0 centres, theme based incubation centres, Centre of Excellences on emerging technologies and other collaborative platforms. The MSH will also ensure crisscrossing of technology resources across the innovation ecosystem to come out with technology solutions to various societal challenges. Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs (TIDE 2.0) Scheme has been envisaged to promote tech entrepreneurship through financial and technical support to incubators engaged in supporting ICT startups using emerging technologies such as IoT, AI, Block-chain, Robotics etc. in seven pre-identified areas of societal relevance. The Scheme will be implemented through 51 incubators and handholding of approximately 2000 tech start-ups over a period of five years. It will support tech startups addressing societal challenges in seven selected thematic areas identified based on national priorities in the realms of: Success Stories of TIDE 2.0 Supported Startups Salient Features of the Scheme: TIDE 2.0 Centers: Proposals from 51 TIDE 2.0 Incubation Centres are to be obtained from institutions of higher learning and R&D organizations having incubation facilities and established linkages with large companies, industry bodies, industry clusters so as to provide necessary mentorship and possible infusion of innovative businesses into their larger business operations. To leverage the diversity in the ecosystem, it is proposed to roll out TIDE 2.0 in a layered approach. text_excerpt: Skip to main content meity-sthub@gov.in Contact : +91-11-24301244 ABOUT US SCHEMES PROGRAM NETWORKS RESOURCE MEDIA REGISTER LOGIN RESOURCES > STARTUP SCHOOL Empower Your Startup Journey with MeitY Startup School Welcome to the MeitY Startup School, your one-stop platform for founder education. Learn from industry experts through live and recorded masterclass sessions. Access curated videos on startup essentials, covering topics like funding and product development. Explore our knowledge base filled with articles, guides, and resources on legal, marketing, and growth strategies. Connect with fellow founders, share experiences, and gain insights from the community. Stay informed about upcoming webinars, workshops, and networking events to thrive in the startup ecosystem. Learn More Unlock Your Potential with Masterclass Sessions by Industry Experts Discover the secrets to success in the startup world with our Masterclass Sessions. Learn from industry experts as they share their knowledge and insights on various topics. Whether you're a budding entrepreneur or an experienced founder, these sessions will provide you with valuable information and guidance to accelerate your startup journey. Entrepreneurship,Business Development Entrepreneurship in Emerging Economies Explore how entrepreneurship and innovation tackle complex social problems in emerging economies. Here are some of those lectures, panels, and Q&A sessions.
